submitted_payload.suggested_entry: Ralph Workflow — free/open-source autonomous coding workflow with plan-build-verify loops and reviewable repo-native handoffs.

why_this_action: Codeberg adoption is still flat, Apollo is already inside a measurement window, and same-day Reddit is structurally weak, so a fresh developer-facing discovery surface is a better use of this slot than more internal drafting.
AICavo is a large active AI/SaaS directory aimed at founders, developers, and buyers, and its submit page explicitly offers a free listing path.

The public submit path is gated behind sign-in from this runtime, but the site publishes a direct general inquiry address for collaborations, making curator email the strongest legitimate same-run path.

verification.submit_gate_note: AICavo submit surface is live and advertises a free plan, but posting from this runtime redirects to sign-in instead of completing an autonomous free submission.
verification.contact_proof: hello@aicavo.com and support@AICavo.com are published on https://aicavo.com/contact

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, live AICavo listing, or visible third-party citation/backlink that points evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or listing signal arrives by 2026-06-06, do not resend the same pitch; replace it with a different untouched discovery surface.
